channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Morgan Wallen Debuts ‘Been By Now,’ His Next Single, Live in Baltimore
item.description: Morgan Wallen lighting up Baltimore with his new single 🎶🔥 Who else needs this on repeat? #CountryMusic #LivePerformance

item.title: Spain World Cup Champions Merch Drops Online: Shop Official T-Shirts, Hoodies and Jerseys Here
item.description: 🎉 Score some stylish Spain World Cup champs gear now! Tap that link and show off your winning spirit ⚽🇪🇸 #SpainChampions #WorldCupMerch

item.title: Morgan Wallen, Garth Brooks, Taylor Swift & More Artists With Most Weeks at No. 1 on Top Country Albums Chart: Full List
item.description: 🎶🤠 Country music royalty alert! 🤩 Check out which artists reign supreme on the Top Country Albums Chart! 🏆🎉 #CountryMusicLegends

item.title: Justin Bieber, Shakira, Madonna, BTS Deliver Electric Halftime Set at World Cup Final
item.description: Who else is still buzzing from that star-studded halftime show at the World Cup Final? 🌟🎶 #MusicLegends #WorldCupVibes

item.title: Canada’s FEQ Gets The Festival Experience Right
item.description: 🇨🇦 Canada's FEQ nails the festival vibe! 🎶✨ Who's ready for some serious music magic up north? #FEQ #FestivalFun
